title: Nesopteris superba
taxonomy: Nesopteris superba is a genus and species of fossil fern from the Triassic period. It was classified in the extinct family Matonialeanaeae. Nesopteris superba is a type of extinct fern that belongs to the division Pteridophyta. Further classification of Nesopteris superba places it within the class Polypodiopsida. As a member of the division Pteridophyta, Nesopteris superba shares characteristics with other ancient fern species.
